name: io.github.gagsy/woocommerce-ops-mcp
title: WooCommerce Ops MCP
description: Expose WooCommerce store operations (orders, inventory, products, reports, cart recovery, sales & marketing) as MCP tools. Installed as a WordPress plugin on your own WooCommerce store - each installation runs on the buyer's own domain, not a centrally hosted service.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <your_api_key> - generate this under WooCommerce > Ops MCP after installing the plugin on your site

site_domain.description: The domain of your own WordPress/WooCommerce site where this plugin is installed, e.g. mystore.com
